truth_insights.invisible_string: Influencer Parasocial Bias: Promoting unverified 'Audifort' without risk disclosure.
truth_insights.evidence_fragment: March 23, 2026 JAMA study: Audifort promotions without disclosure flagged as deceptive.

audifort (360 degree) benefits in the field of hearing health, supporting millions of people with improved hearing health since its creation, including a 90-day guarantee and complimentary bonuses for taking care of your hearing starting today.
